title: SLAMD Product Comparison
description: Compare LDAP server performance across products with identical test conditions

list.name: op_type
list.label: Op Type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT op_type FROM slamd_op_summary ORDER BY op_type

list.name: thread_count
list.label: Thread Count
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT thread_count FROM slamd_run WHERE thread_count IS NOT NULL ORDER BY thread_count

list.name: test_config
list.label: 성능 측정 설정
list.query: SELECT config_label || ' (' || to_char(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ')' AS __text, config_hash || '__' || to_char(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM (SELECT jp.config_label, jp.config_hash, r.start_time::date AS start_date FROM slamd_job_params jp JOIN slamd_run r ON jp.job_id = r.job_id JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id WHERE s.op_type = '${op_type}' AND r.thread_count = ${thread_count} AND jp.config_hash IS NOT NULL GROUP BY jp.config_hash, jp.config_label, r.start_time::date) sub ORDER BY start_date DESC, config_label

list.name: product
list.label: Product
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM slamd_run WHERE product_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY product_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT seconds, product_name, ops FROM (SELECT (n.ord - 1) * i.collection_interval AS seconds, r.product_name, ROUND(n.ops::numeric) AS ops FROM slamd_op_interval i JOIN slamd_run r ON i.job_id = r.job_id JOIN slamd_job_params jp ON r.job_id = jp.job_id, unnest(i.ops_per_sec) WITH ORDINALITY AS n(ops, ord) WHERE i.op_type = '${op_type}' AND r.thread_count = ${thread_count} AND r.product_name IN (${product:singlequote}) AND jp.config_hash = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 1) AND r.start_time::date = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 2)::date UNION ALL SELECT 0, '__base__', 0 WHERE '${y_scale}' = '전체') t ORDER BY product_name, seconds

SELECT r.product_name AS "Product", r.thread_count AS "Threads", r.job_id AS "Job ID", ROUND(s.tps::numeric, 2) AS "Avg TPS", ROUND(s.avg_latency_ms::numeric, 3) AS "Avg Latency (ms)", s.total_count AS "Total Count", ROUND((s.success_rate * 100)::numeric, 2) AS "Success %", r.duration_seconds AS "Duration (s)" FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id JOIN slamd_job_params jp ON r.job_id = jp.job_id WHERE s.op_type = '${op_type}' AND r.thread_count = ${thread_count} AND r.product_name IN (${product:singlequote}) AND jp.config_hash = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 1) AND r.start_time::date = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 2)::date ORDER BY r.product_name

SELECT r.product_name AS "Product", ROUND(s.tps::numeric, 2) AS "TPS", s.op_type, r.job_type, r.job_description, r.current_state, to_char(r.start_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(r.stop_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS stop_time, r.duration_seconds FROM slamd_run r JOIN slamd_op_summary s ON r.job_id = s.job_id JOIN slamd_job_params jp ON r.job_id = jp.job_id WHERE s.op_type = '${op_type}' AND r.thread_count = ${thread_count} AND r.product_name IN (${product:singlequote}) AND jp.config_hash = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 1) AND r.start_time::date = split_part('${test_config}', '__', 2)::date ORDER BY r.product_name
